title: Sheri Buretta, Phil Blumstein receive Visionary Award
summary: ​Chugach CEO Gabe Kompkoff recognized Chugach Board Chairman Sheri Buretta and Board Attorney Phil Blumstein with Visionary Awards, for the work that led to the successful Bering River Coal Field (BRCF) coal rights sale. “We would like to recognize each of you with Chugach’s new Visionary Award for...

title: Chugach’s Core Behaviors Lead to Success
summary: There are few companies that are as rich in history as the Chugach Alaska Corporation. Established under the Alaska Native Claim Settlement Act (ANCSA) in 1972, the sole purpose of the Chugach Alaska Corporation is to serve the needs of Alaska Native people. Opportunities are provided to more than 2...

title: Crystal Shawanda
summary: May 21, 2018 On the Wikwemikong reserve of Manitoulin Island, Ontario, Crystal Shawanda grew up with country music and the blues. The pain and authenticity in artists’ voices moved her as she sang at funerals at a young age, a witness to alcoholism and depression in her community. Always self-motiva...
